highlights.description: Initial release of AgentPair - a Go implementation of agent-to-agent pair programming between Claude and Codex
Paired and single-agent execution modes with JSONL bridge communication and MCP tool integration
Full workspace support including tmux side-by-side panes and git worktree isolation

added.description: Agent interface with Claude and Codex implementations
Claude CLI wrapper using NDJSON protocol
Codex App Server client using JSON-RPC 2.0
JSONL-based bridge for agent-to-agent messaging with SHA256 deduplication
Orchestration loop with state machine: init → working → reviewing → complete
PASS/FAIL/DONE signal parsing for loop control
Run persistence with manifest.json, bridge.jsonl, and transcript.jsonl
tmux session management with side-by-side Claude/Codex panes
Git worktree automation for isolated run environments
Structured logging via slog with context-based logger retrieval
JSONL utilities package for reading/writing newline-delimited JSON
Cobra-based CLI with all flags and subcommands

documentation.description: README with installation, usage, and architecture overview
MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
Getting started guides: installation, quick start, configuration
Concept explanations: architecture, state machine, bridge, MCP
User guides: paired sessions, single-agent, tmux, worktrees, resuming
Reference documentation: CLI, config file, message format

tests.description: Unit tests for internal/run (manifest, transcript, manager)
